compiled_state.title: add test coverage for PREPLANNING_CONTEXT ticket comment mechanism in preplanning, implementation-plan, and design-wireframe skills
compiled_state.author: Test

comments.body: Deferred from review pass 5 of LLM-behavioral bug fix commit. Tests needed for: (1) preplanning writes PREPLANNING_CONTEXT to ticket comment, (2) implementation-plan reads from last PREPLANNING_CONTEXT comment, (3) design-wireframe reads from last PREPLANNING_CONTEXT comment.
comments.author: Test
